ops.body: From Track F (2026-07-18): the plan's 'Health/Shutdown-before-proto-gate fix' does not map to mountd as-is (no Shutdown op; proto-1 refusal is documented frozen policy pinned by TestWireRefusesProtoOne). The coherent mountd form is answer OpHello+OpHealth BEFORE the proto gate so a cross-proto peer can negotiate/read the version — deferred to this track since it changes documented frozen-wire policy and only matters once the multi-tenant daemon needs cross-proto negotiation. Track F's verified-safe patch sketch: after decode, before the proto gate: if req.Op == OpHello || req.Op == OpHealth { writeResp(conn, s.dispatch(req)); return }. Needs a pinning test + a golden update when landed.
